heading: Service on vessels in slave trade
label: 1586 Service on vessels in slave trade
text: Whoever, being a citizen or resident of the United States, voluntarily serves on board of any vessel employed or made use of in the transportation of slaves from any foreign country or place to another, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than two years, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 427 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 25235 Stat. 1139Mandatory-punishment provisions were rephrased in the alternative.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $2,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
